data.title: Dollar Index Sinks To Decades-Low — What It Mean For Crypto Prices?
data.description:
In the first half of 2025, the U. S. Dollar Index (DXY) dropped nearly 10% — its worst six-month slump in almost 40 years — bottoming near 98. 6 by June 12
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/20/dollar-index-sinks-to-decades-low-what-it-mean-for-crypto-prices/

data.title: Circle: CCTP V2 is now live on the Solana blockchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle announced on the X platform that its cross-chain transmission protocol CCTP V2 has been launched on the Solana blockchain, supporting developers and users to quickly transfer funds, as well as smart contract integration for post-transfer operations. So far, other blockchains that support CCTP V2 include Arbitrum, AVAX, Base, Ethereum, Linea, Optimism, Sonic Labs and World Chain.

data.title: Opinion: Don’t worry about the future of Bitcoin after Trump leaves office
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Eric Semler, chairman of Semler Scientific Inc., a U.S. listed company that adopts a Bitcoin strategy, said that many hedge funds are skeptical about the future of Bitcoin after U.S. President Donald Trump leaves office, but he is renewing that this is an unrealistic idea. Eric Semler added: "When you bet on something that most people don't believe in, and you are right, you can make more money. I think we have a good opportunity to show people that they (hedge funds) have basically missed a good opportunity. The best investments I have made are those areas where I seem to be fighting alone in the wilderness." According to a survey conducted by PwC, 47% of hedge fund managers trading in traditional markets have been exposed to cryptocurrencies, which shows that hedge funds are actually turning to Bitcoin. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Apple Considers Acquisition of Perplexity AI to Enhance Search Engine Capabilities
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Apple executives are reportedly discussing the potential acquisition of Perplexity AI, which could bolster the development of an AI-based search engine. If the acquisition does not proceed, Apple plans to integrate Perplexity as a search engine option within its Safari browser. Previously, Meta, led by Mark Zuckerberg, abandoned negotiations to acquire Perplexity and instead invested approximately $14 billion in Scale AI, acquiring a 49% stake.

data.title: Planet Morning News
Nasdaq approves blockchain ASIC chip developer AGM Group's request to continue listing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AGM Group, a blockchain ASIC chip R&D listed company, announced that it has received a compliance letter from Nasdaq, notifying the company that it has met the purchase price requirements under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550 (a) (2), and therefore approved its request to continue to be listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. AGM Group previously received a delisting notice from Nasdaq in April this year, and AGM Group subsequently appealed. (Globenewswire)

data.title: AGM Group Meets Nasdaq Compliance for Continued Listing
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain ASIC chip development company AGM Group has announced that it has received a compliance letter from Nasdaq. The letter informs the company that it now meets the bid price requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), thereby approving its request to remain listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. Earlier this year, in April, AGM Group received a delisting notice from Nasdaq, which prompted the company to file an appeal.

data.title: GENIUS Act Passage Marks Major Win for Crypto Community
data.description: According to BlockBeats, David Sacks, the White House's head of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence, known as the 'Crypto Czar,' stated in an interview with FOX that the passage of the GENIUS Act represents a significant victory for the cryptocurrency community.

data.title: Binance Alpha AVAIL Phase 2 Airdrop is now available
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official page information, the second phase of Binance Alpha AVAIL airdrop is now open for redemption. Users with Alpha points reaching 199 points can receive 2,667 tokens.

data.title: Paidun: Web3 security protocol Hacken suspected to be attacked
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paidun published a post on the X platform stating that the Web3 security protocol Hacken (HAI) was suspected to have been attacked, and may have been affected by this. Market data showed that the price of its token HAI fell by about 100% in a short period of time.

data.title: Animoca Brands announces purchase of CTA tokens from open market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Animoca Brands announced a strategic partnership with the blockchain cross-media ecosystem Cross the Ages. Animoca Brands will support Cross the Ages' upcoming multiplayer action role-playing game Arise, and has begun to acquire CTA tokens from the open market (the specific amount has not been disclosed). In addition, it will provide advice to the project in terms of marketing strategy, review and token economics.

data.title: The probability of the Fed keeping its policy unchanged in July has dropped to 83.5%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed Governor Waller was clearly dovish last night. According to CME's "Fed Watch": the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in July has dropped to 83.5% (91.7% yesterday), and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 16.5%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in September is 29%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 60.2%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 10.8%. (Jinshi)

Bitcoin treasury mania has hit the United Kingdom.

data.title: Degen: DEGEN has become the default token of Farcaster applet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Degen posted on the X platform that if developers are developing mini-programs for Farcaster, they will find that DEGEN has become the default token. This choice was made because DEGEN is more attractive to community users than USDC or WETH. In addition, Degen also disclosed that it had airdropped more than $100 million worth of DEGEN tokens to Farcaster users last year, and will continue to expand support in the future.

data.title: CoinMarketCap Front-End Security Alert Issued
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Scam Sniffer has detected an attack on the front-end of CoinMarketCap. Users are advised to remain vigilant and take necessary precautions to protect their information.

data.title: After AguilaTrades increased its long position to 400 million for the third time, BTC fell again, and the current floating loss is 7.85 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, trader AguilaTrades increased his BTC long position to more than $400 million at 19:30 last night, when the BTC price was about $106,000. Since then, the BTC price has been falling, reaching a low of $102,340, and AguilaTrades has also suffered a retracement for the third time after a large increase in positions.
Its current position is: 20 times leverage long 3,522 BTC, the position is worth about $363 million, the average opening price is $105,084, the liquidation price is $100,690, and the current floating loss is about $7.857 million. Previously, when the position reached $424 million, it once had a floating profit of $3.63 million.

data.title: Malicious pop-up window appears on CoinMarketCap official website, officials remind you not to connect your wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CoinMarketCap officially posted on the X platform that it has noticed a malicious pop-up window on the website prompting users to "verify their wallets", reminding users not to connect their wallets. The CoinMarketCap team is actively investigating and working hard to resolve the issue.

data.title: San Francisco Fed President Daly Hints at Possible Rate Cut in Fall
data.description: According to BlockBeats, San Francisco Federal Reserve President Mary Daly, who will be a voting member of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) in 2027, indicated that waiting for perfect conditions before cutting interest rates is not feasible. Daly mentioned that with more information, a rate cut might occur in the fall. She emphasized her desire to prevent the U.S. job market from weakening further, noting that both the U.S. economy and FOMC monetary policy are currently in good condition.

data.title: Uniswap and Morpho jointly launched the Web3SOC security governance framework to improve DeFi compliance and institutional adaptability
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Uniswap Labs, Morpho, Maple Finance, Kiln and Steakhouse Financial are working with security companies Cantina and Secureum to launch a new security and governance framework Web3SOC, which aims to enhance the compliance and institutional collaboration capabilities of DeFi projects. 
Web3SOC provides a hierarchical framework that helps projects measure their readiness for compliance, security and institutional collaboration through self-assessment tools and "maturity level" standards to enhance the robustness and credibility of the entire DeFi ecosystem. (The Block)
